detail.description:
🎁Get Ma Chao this Year of the Horse! Log in to claim this powerful general!

Download now to receive Ma Chao, a five-star exclusive ghost hero to help you conquer the land.

Even more exclusive benefits await: "Ten Thousand Draws in a Millennium," making dominating the Three Kingdoms a reality!

Guan Yu cleaved a rift in time and space with his sword, bringing forth ghost heroes from the Three Kingdoms. From then on, humans and ghosts coexisted, two heroes reigning side by side.

detail.recentChanges:
「更新內容」
1、新增耕耘獻禮主題節日活動
2、內容優化
- 部分寶物類型重新調整（如攻擊或防禦）對應寶物技能類型爲主
- 首個幻獸上陣調整，從60級下調至55級
- 幻獸家園升級要求下降
- 元寶商城/VIP特權界面新增代金券說明（方便各位主公查看禮包檔位對應價格與VIP經驗）
3、BUG修複
- 官職戰令價格顯示異常問題
- 快速征收次數顯示異常問題
